summary: Main Menu UI Redesign Iteration 2 - All tests PASSED. Backend chat API (8/8 tests), frontend UI verification on desktop and mobile completed successfully.

integration_issues.issue: CORS errors fetching from dogefood-lab-api.onrender.com (old cached URL). This is pre-existing from iteration 8 and not related to current changes.

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Logo removed from header (line 676-681 in MainMenu.js)
✅ Logo added to left sidebar at bottom below Game Guide (lines 449-453)
✅ ScientistChat component removed (no import in MainMenu.js)
✅ LiveChat component implemented with real-time messaging (lines 85-281)
✅ Season 1 Rewards promo banner uses Rocket icon (line 876)
✅ Yellow color scheme applied to Lab and Tourney cards (from-yellow-500 gradient)
✅ Chat shows 'Connect wallet or sign up to chat' for non-logged users (line 275)
✅ All data-testid attributes present for testing
✅ Chat API endpoints working: GET /api/chat/messages, POST /api/chat/send
context_for_next_testing_agent: Main menu redesign complete with LiveChat. All requested features verified: logo in sidebar, ScientistChat removed, LiveChat with real-time messaging, Rocket icon for Season 1 Countdown, yellow colors for Lab/Tourney cards. Mobile chat toggle and overlay working correctly.
